package main

import (
	"fmt"
	"math"
)

func main() {
    var a, b, c float64

    fmt.Scan(&a)
    fmt.Scan(&b)
    fmt.Scan(&c)

    p := (a + b + c) / 2
    area := math.Sqrt(p * (p - a) * (p - b) * (p - c))

    fmt.Printf("%.2f\n", area)
}
